2605.19633.title: optimize_anything: A Universal API for Optimizing any Text Parameter
2605.19633.paper_summary: Can a single LLM-based optimization system match specialized tools across fundamentally different domains? We show that when optimization problems are formulated as improving a text artifact evaluated by a scoring function, a single AI-based optimization system-supporting single-task search, multi-task search with cross-problem transfer, and generalization to unseen inputs-achieves state-of-the-art results across six diverse tasks. Our system discovers agent architectures that nearly triple Gemini Flash's ARC-AGI accuracy (32.5% to 89.5%), finds scheduling algorithms that cut cloud costs by 40%, generates CUDA kernels where 87% match or beat PyTorch, and outperforms AlphaEvolve's reported circle packing solution (n=26). Ablations across three domains reveal that actionable side information yields faster convergence and substantially higher final scores than score-only feedback, and that multi-task search outperforms independent optimization given equivalent per-problem budget through cross-task transfer, with benefits scaling with the number of related tasks. Together, we show for the first time that text optimization with LLM-based search is a general-purpose problem-solving paradigm, unifying tasks traditionally requiring domain-specific algorithms under a single framework. We open-source optimize\_anything with support for multiple backends as part of the GEPA project at https://github.com/gepa-ai/gepa .
2605.19633.paper_summary_zh: 一個基於 LLM 的優化系統能否在根本不同的領域中與專門工具相匹配？我們展示了當優化問題被表述為改善由評分函數評估的文本工件時，一個單一的基於 AI 的優化系統——支持單任務搜索、多任務搜索與跨問題轉移，以及對未見輸入的泛化——在六個不同的任務中達到了最先進的結果。我們的系統發現的代理架構幾乎將 Gemini Flash 的 ARC-AGI 準確率提高了三倍（從 32.5% 提升至 89.5%），找到的排程算法將雲端成本降低了 40%，生成的 CUDA 核心有 87% 與 PyTorch 匹配或超越，並且在圓形打包解決方案上超越了 AlphaEvolve 報告的結果（n=26）。在三個領域的消融實驗中顯示，具有可操作的側面信息比僅依賴評分的反饋能更快收斂並顯著提高最終得分，而多任務搜索在給定相同每個問題預算的情況下，通過跨任務轉移超越了獨立優化，並且隨著相關任務數量的增加而受益。我們首次展示了基於 LLM 的文本優化是一種通用的問題解決範式，將傳統上需要特定領域算法的任務統一在單一框架下。我們將 optimize\_anything 開源，並支持多個後端，作為 GEPA 項目的一部分，網址為 https://github.com/gepa-ai/gepa 。
2605.19633.author: Lakshya A Agrawal et.al.
2605.19633.authors: Lakshya A Agrawal, Donghyun Lee, Shangyin Tan, Wenjie Ma, Karim Elmaaroufi, Rohit Sandadi, Sanjit A. Seshia, Koushik Sen, Dan Klein, Ion Stoica, Joseph E. Gonzalez, Omar Khattab, Alexandros G. Dimakis, Matei Zaharia
